# Santa Monica Tailor by Bello

> Premier bespoke tailoring studio in Santa Monica, California. Master tailor Javier Bello has over 20 years of experience crafting and perfecting garments for discerning clients across the Westside of Los Angeles.

## Business Information

- **Name**: Santa Monica Tailor by Bello
- **Master Tailor**: Javier Bello
- **Address**: 724 Santa Monica Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90401
- **Phone**: +1 (424) 301-0146
- **Email**: hello@santamonicatailorbybello.com
- **Website**: https://www.santamonicatailorbybello.com
- **Hours**: Monday–Friday 9am–6pm, Saturday 10am–5pm, Sunday Closed
- **Walk-ins**: Welcome during business hours

## Services

- [Custom Suits](/services/custom-suits-santa-monica) — Fully bespoke suits crafted from scratch, fabric selection to final fitting
- [Suit Alterations](/services/suit-alterations-santa-monica) — Jacket tapering, trouser hemming, sleeve shortening, full resizing
- [Wedding & Formalwear](/services/wedding-formalwear-tailoring) — Bespoke wedding suits, tuxedo tailoring, groomsmen alterations
- [Garment Care & Repairs](/services/garment-care-repairs) — Button replacement, zipper repair, reweaving, relining
- [Men's Tailoring & Alterations](/services/mens-tailoring-alterations) — Trousers, shirts, jackets, full wardrobe
- [Luxury Brand Alterations](/services/luxury-brand-alterations) — Brioni, Tom Ford, Armani, Kiton, Canali, Hermès

## Areas Served

- [Santa Monica](/areas/santa-monica-tailor)
- [Beverly Hills](/areas/beverly-hills-tailor)
- [Brentwood](/areas/brentwood-tailor)
- [Malibu](/areas/malibu-tailor)
- [Pacific Palisades](/areas/pacific-palisades-tailor)
- [Bel Air](/areas/bel-air-tailor)
- [West Hollywood](/areas/west-hollywood-tailor)
- [Culver City](/areas/culver-city-tailor)

## Consultation Tiers

- **The Fitting** — Standard consultation for alterations and adjustments
- **The Commission** — Full bespoke garment creation service
- **The Vision** — Private after-hours consultation by arrangement only

- [How a Suit Should Fit: The Complete Guide](/journal/how-a-suit-should-fit)

- Online: https://www.santamonicatailorbybello.com/booking
- Phone: +1 (424) 301-0146
- Walk-ins welcome at 724 Santa Monica Blvd
